text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
H-hiya guys! ♪ Your one and only El is back in
action! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...No, it's missing something! I need a little more oomph! Like I'm bringing the world right to your doorstep!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh. So you're hopping on that whole "world"
shtick too, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ack! Who's there?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just you, Golshi. What are you doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? I'm here because you're throwing
the word "world" around like it's a sack of
potatoes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
H-how am I throwing it around?! I'm serious about
aiming to be the world's strongest! I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest, huh? Not sure about that
one.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You talk the talk, but I don't see a lot of walking.
I sense hesitation. You're lost.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: W-well...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's got you rackin' your brains, hm? Lay it on
me! You afraid of the world?! HUH?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No! If I'm running, I'm not losing! Doesn't matter
where in the world or with who! But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My performances are nothing like Pearl's... So I
started thinking just maybe, they're not
world-class yet...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, cut that out. You're acting like a piece of
grilled fish at the supermarket—letting someone
else do all the cooking.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're nothing like Pearl? Or the others? Gimme
that spatula so I can flip you out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nobody else matters! You've gotta bring out your
own flavors! Spice yourself up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: M-my own flavors?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! What you're lacking is your own
unique flavor! Give me some umami! Sprinkle on
those bonito flakes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Yeah, the trainer secretly
watching us from the shadows! You agree with
me, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect to be thrown into the spotlight
suddenly. What should I say here...
choice_data_list: Yeah, you need some original flavor!
Yeah, you need some original flavor!
No, it's all down to the recipe!
No, it's all down to the recipe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect to be thrown into the spotlight
suddenly. What should I say here...
choice_data_list: Yeah, you need some original flavor!
Yeah, you need some original flavor!
No, it's all down to the recipe!
No, it's all down to the recipe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Original flavor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You might have a point... In wanting to be like
someone else, I lost sight of myself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If anything, I should be showering everyone in my colors! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna reflect on myself and find my own way
of doing things!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh, now you get it. What do you think
crustaceans use their pincers for? To crab their
dreams.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I should know what my own flavors are.
What makes me unique...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...is how I pack the heat! I've got passion, spunk,
and vitality!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If the recipe I'm using doesn't show off those
flavors, what's the point?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, I need to come up with a performance
that's really all about me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I like that spark in your eyes... You better
come back as the king of the deep seas one of
these days.
